---
title: "WEMF Regions map"
output: html_notebook
---

Displaying the language regions in SHEDS ( https://wemf.ch/media/wemf.ch/media/wemf-gebiete_2017.pdf?redirect=true)
Display map:
```{r}
# WEMF Regions Map for Switzerland with bfsMaps package
# Source: https://wemf.ch/media/wemf.ch/media/wemf-gebiete_2017.pdf

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(bfsMaps)

current_dir <- getwd()
# Set your bfsMaps data path
source(file.path(current_dir,"src","R","utils.R"))

library(yaml)

config <- yaml.load_file("config.yaml")
options(bfsMaps.base = config$paths$geodata_bezirke)
#options(bfsMaps.base="/home/amy/MapData/2022_GEOM_TK")


# Load SHEDS data and compute region percentages
data_path <- file.path(config$paths$data_dir, config$sheds_files[["2025"]])
sheds <- read_clean_sheds(data_path)
sheds <- sheds[sheds$screen != 3, ]

region_pct <- sheds |>
  filter(!is.na(region)) |>
  count(region) |>
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100)

# Build legend labels dynamically
legend_labels <- wemf_regions |>
  left_join(region_pct, by = c("region_id" = "region")) |>
  mutate(label = sprintf("%s (%.1f%%)", region_name, replace_na(pct, 0))) |>
  pull(label)

# WEMF Region definitions
# 1 Suisse romande     (Zones 11-16)
# 2 Alpen und Voralpen (Zones 21-29)
# 3 Westmittelland     (Zones 31-34)
# 4 Ostmittelland      (Zones 41-44)
# 5 Svizzera italiana Ticino (Zone 51)
# 6 Liechtenstein      (Zone 61) - not in BFS data

wemf_regions <- data.frame(
  region_id = 1:5,
  region_name = c("Suisse romande", "Alpen und Voralpen", "Westmittelland",
                  "Ostmittelland", "Svizzera italiana"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


wemf_mapping <- tribble(
  ~name, ~region_id,

  # REGION 1: SUISSE ROMANDE
  # Zone 11: Genève
  "Cant. de Genève", 1,

  # Zone 12: Vaud
  "Aigle", 1,
  "Broye-Vully", 1,
  "Gros-de-Vaud", 1,
  "Jura-Nord vaudois", 1,
  "Lausanne", 1,
  "Lavaux-Oron", 1,
  "Morges", 1,
  "Nyon", 1,
  "Ouest lausannois", 1,
  "Riviera-Pays-d'Enhaut", 1,

  # Zone 13: Neuchâtel
  "Cant. de Neuchâtel", 1,
  "Boudry", 1,
  "Val-de-Ruz", 1,
  "Val-de-Travers", 1,
  "La Chaux-de-Fonds", 1,
  "Le Locle", 1,

  # Zone 14: Jura
  "Delémont", 1,
  "Porrentruy", 1,
  "Les Franches-Montagnes", 1,
  "Jura bernois", 1,

  # Zone 15: Fribourg
  "La Broye", 1,
  "La Glâne", 1,
  "La Gruyère", 1,
  "La Sarine", 1,
  "See / Lac", 1,
  "Sense", 1,
  "La Veveyse", 1,

  # Zone 16: Bas-Valais
  "Monthey", 1,
  "Saint-Maurice", 1,
  "Martigny", 1,
  "Entremont", 1,
  "Conthey", 1,
  "Sion", 1,
  "Hérens", 1,
  "Sierre", 1,

  # REGION 2: ALPEN UND VORALPEN
  # Zone 21: Luzern / OW / NW
  "Luzern-Stadt", 2,
  "Luzern-Land", 2,
  "Hochdorf", 2,
  "Sursee", 2,
  "Willisau", 2,
  "Entlebuch", 2,
  "Kt. Obwalden", 2,
  "Kt. Nidwalden", 2,

  # Zone 22: Berner Oberland
  "Thun", 2,
  "Frutigen-Niedersimmental", 2,
  "Interlaken-Oberhasli", 2,
  "Obersimmental-Saanen", 2,

  # Zone 23: Oberwallis
  "Leuk", 2,
  "Raron", 2,
  "Visp", 2,
  "Brig", 2,
  "Goms", 2,

  # Zone 24: Zug
  "Kt. Zug", 2,

  # Zone 25: Uri / Schwyz
  "Kt. Uri", 2,
  "Schwyz", 2,
  "Gersau", 2,
  "Küssnacht (SZ)", 2,
  "Einsiedeln", 2,
  "March", 2,
  "Höfe", 2,

  # Zone 26: St. Gallen / AI / AR
  "St. Gallen", 2,
  "Rorschach", 2,
  "Rheintal", 2,
  "Werdenberg", 2,
  "Sarganserland", 2,
  "See-Gaster", 2,
  "Toggenburg", 2,
  "Wil", 2,
  "Hinterland", 2,
  "Mittelland", 2,
  "Vorderland", 2,
  "Kt. Appenzell i.Rh.", 2,

  # Zone 27: Glarus / Obersee
  "Kt. Glarus", 2,

  # Zone 28: Bündner Unterland
  "Imboden", 2,
  "Landquart", 2,
  "Plessur", 2,
  "Prättigau/Davos", 2,

  # Zone 29: Bündner Oberland
  "Surselva", 2,
  "Albula", 2,
  "Viamala", 2,
  "Maloja", 2,
  "Engiadina Bassa/Val Müstair", 2,
  "Bernina", 2,

  # REGION 3: WESTMITTELLAND
  # Zone 31: Basel
  "Kt. Basel-Stadt", 3,
  "Arlesheim", 3,
  "Liestal", 3,
  "Laufen", 3,
  "Sissach", 3,
  "Waldenburg", 3,
  "Dorneck", 3,
  "Thierstein", 3,
  "Thal", 3,

  # Zone 32: Solothurn
  "Solothurn", 3,
  "Lebern", 3,
  "Bucheggberg", 3,
  "Wasseramt", 3,
  "Gäu", 3,
  "Gösgen", 3,
  "Olten", 3,
  "Zofingen", 3,

  # Zone 33: Berner Seeland
  "Biel/Bienne", 3,
  "Seeland", 3,

  # Zone 34: Berner Mittelland
  "Bern-Mittelland", 3,
  "Emmental", 3,
  "Oberaargau", 3,

  # REGION 4: OSTMITTELLAND
  # Zone 41: Aargau ( from Bern)
  "Aarau", 4,
  "Baden", 4,
  "Bremgarten", 4,
  "Brugg", 4,
  "Kulm", 4,
  "Laufenburg", 4,
  "Lenzburg", 4,
  "Muri", 4,
  "Rheinfelden", 4,
  "Zurzach", 4,

  # Zone 42: Schaffhausen
  "Schaffhausen", 4,
  "Stein", 4,
  "Reiat", 4,
  "Oberklettgau", 4,
  "Unterklettgau", 4,
  "Schleitheim", 4,

  # Zone 43: Zürich
  "Zürich", 4,
  "Affoltern", 4,
  "Andelfingen", 4,
  "Bülach", 4,
  "Dielsdorf", 4,
  "Dietikon", 4,
  "Hinwil", 4,
  "Horgen", 4,
  "Meilen", 4,
  "Pfäffikon", 4,
  "Uster", 4,
  "Winterthur", 4,

  # Zone 44: Thurgau
  "Arbon", 4,
  "Frauenfeld", 4,
  "Kreuzlingen", 4,
  "Münchwilen", 4,
  "Weinfelden", 4,

  # REGION 5: SVIZZERA ITALIANA
  # Zone 51: Ticino (+ Moesa from Graubünden)
  "Bellinzona", 5,
  "Blenio", 5,
  "Leventina", 5,
  "Locarno", 5,
  "Lugano", 5,
  "Mendrisio", 5,
  "Riviera", 5,
  "Vallemaggia", 5,
  "Moesa", 5      # Italian-speaking part of Graubünden
)

wemf_region_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#F4A5A7",  # Suisse romande - Pastel pink/red
  "2" = "#A8C5E2",  # Alpen und Voralpen - Pastel blue
  "3" = "#A8D5A2",  # Westmittelland - Pastel green
  "4" = "#C5B3D9",  # Ostmittelland - Pastel lavender
  "5" = "#F9D88B"   # Svizzera italiana - Pastel yellow/gold
)

create_wemf_map <- function() {
  bezirke_sf <- st_as_sf(GetMap("bezk.map"))

  # Join with WEMF mapping
  bezirke_wemf <- bezirke_sf %>%
    left_join(wemf_mapping, by = "name")

  # Check for unmatched
  unmatched <- bezirke_wemf %>% filter(is.na(region_id)) %>% pull(name)
  if (length(unmatched) > 0) {
    cat("Unmatched districts:\n")
    print(sort(unmatched))
  }

  cat("\nRegion distribution:\n")
  print(table(bezirke_wemf$region_id, useNA = "ifany"))

  # Get lakes
  lakes_sf <- tryCatch({
    st_as_sf(GetMap("gde.see"))
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  # Create legend labels with percentages
  # These percentages are extracted from the data but hardcoded here to not process the data again
  #legend_labels <- c(
  #  "Suisse romande (22.3%)",
  #  "Alpen und Voralpen (20.3%)",
  #  "Westmittelland (21.5%)",
  #  "Ostmittelland (25.5%)",
  #  "Svizzera italiana (10.4%)"
  #)
  # Plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = bezirke_wemf, aes(fill = factor(region_id)),
            color = "white", linewidth = 0.2)

  if (!is.null(lakes_sf)) {
    p <- p + geom_sf(data = lakes_sf, fill = "lightblue", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.1)
  }

  p <- p +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = wemf_region_colors,
      # labels = wemf_regions$region_name,
      labels = legend_labels,
      name = "WEMF Region",
      na.value = "grey80"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
        plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = NA)))

  return(p)
}


p <- create_wemf_map()
print(p)

save_plot(filename = "wemf_map_regions", plot = p)

```
